rulings.Case Title: UNIVERSAL INTERACTIVE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al VS. CONTINENTAL CASUALTY COMPANY, AN ILLINOIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf To Comply With Req.'S For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Interrogatories, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 13, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANT AMERICAN E & S INSURANCE BROKERS CALIFORNIA, INC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Comply With Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Interrogatories, Set One. Granted regarding the requested discovery. Plaintiff must engage in a diligent good faith effort to comply and provide further documents and interrogatory responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant is awarded $3,000 in sanctions. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC., A CALIFORNIA et al VS. KARIN THURM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 13, 2011, line 9. DEFENDANT KARIN THURM, ROSS MADDEN, JANICE THURM, DAVID THURM MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Granted. Defendant has made a prima facie showing that plaintffs' suit arose from an act in furtherance of defendants' right of petition or free speech. Plaintiffs fail to demonstrate that their claims would succeed on the merits. Defendants are awarded costs and attorney fees in the amount of $7,517.50. =(302/CWW)
